next_action.description: FIRST check background R2 upload of NSFW Raw int8 (log: scratchpad/nsfw_up.log). When it commits (rclone size shows object), re-download SFW Raw int8 (krea2_raw_int8_convrot, 13.49GB, was TRUNCATED - use curl -fL --retry -C - and assert size==13492686496), then upload SERIALIZED (--transfers 1 --bwlimit 3M, never concurrent). Then sha256sum all 3 new files and fill null SHA256 in modelDeps.js (krea2-raw-transformer, krea2-raw-transformer-nsfw) + loraDeps.js (krea2-lora-identity-edit). SEPARATELY: user has further workflow edits - when exported, re-convert raw->API (scripts/workflow-to-api.mjs) then re-run generate_krea2.py + validate.

key_decisions: 4 cards = {High,Balanced}x{SFW,NSFW}, TURBO-IN-NAME: High='Krea 2'/'Krea 2 NSFW', Balanced='Krea 2 Turbo'/'Krea 2 Turbo NSFW'.
High = Raw int8 (cfg 3 + negativePrompt:true); Balanced = Turbo (cfg 1, negativePrompt:false). Edit op on ALL 4 cards, edit LoRA dep of all 4.
Person-SWAP fails on ALL variants (Turbo AND Raw) - LoRA v1.1 ceiling, deferred to v1.2. v1 LoRA rejected (plastic/oversaturated). SHIP LoRA = v1.1 r128 (best texture+least noise).
bf16 Raw REJECTED: 945s vs int8 580s on 4060Ti, no fidelity win worth it. int8_convrot = ship quant.
Generator: t2i has Input_Tier -> 4 (VARIANTS); tierless detailer/upscaler pick TURBO vs RAW weight BY FILENAME -> 2 each (LEGACY_VARIANTS/RAW_VARIANTS).
High cards use RAW detailer/upscaler; Balanced keep TURBO.
constraints: R2 uploads MUST be serialized + bwlimit 3M (never concurrent up+down). Documented in R2 playbook.
In-flight rclone multipart reads as 0 until 100% commit - check the log not lsf.
NEVER run orchestrate.py on dirty comfy_workflows tree. Use workflow-to-api.mjs single-file + generate_krea2.py directly.
raw/ is user-owned - convert FROM it, never write TO it.
SFW Raw int8 on disk is TRUNCATED (2.76GB) - re-download clean before upload/SHA. NSFW (13.15GB) present, uploading.
curl -s swallows errors silently (exit 0 on truncated file) - always -fL --retry -C - + assert byte size.
comfyui-krea2edit = installRequirements:false -> rides volume, NO Pod rebuild. At G:/ComfyUi/ComfyUI/custom_nodes/comfyui-krea2edit/, node_lock @ 17af88332728c97ab5c7d26296b2cae59c935976.

resume_prompt: Resuming MPI-282 (Krea2 as an editor) on branch 1.2.0. Read .agents/mpi-kanban/state/handoffs/c84ef9b9-7f50-458a-867e-32301552f42b.json and the MPI-282 task card, then use mpi-continue. Code is committed (b972df5b): 4-card Krea2 set {High=Raw/edit, Balanced=Turbo} x {SFW,NSFW}, generator does 4-variant, edit LoRA + Raw transformers + comfyui-krea2edit node all wired and dep-verified. TWO threads remain: (1) R2 uploads - a background rclone is uploading NSFW Raw int8 (scratchpad/nsfw_up.log, serialized+3MB cap); when it commits, re-download the TRUNCATED SFW Raw int8 (krea2_raw_int8_convrot, must be 13492686496 bytes, curl -fL --retry -C - + size assert), upload it serialized, then sha256sum all 3 R2 files and fill the null SHA256 in modelDeps.js + loraDeps.js. (2) The user is making further workflow edits (detailer/upscaler) - when exported to comfy_workflows/raw/, re-convert with scripts/workflow-to-api.mjs then re-run generate_krea2.py + validate-injection-rules.mjs. NEVER run orchestrate.py on a dirty tree; NEVER run concurrent R2 transfers. Deferred: app-side prompt-box edit-op wiring (Input_Image_2 slot + Is_Edit toggle) untested.
